package rulecoverage

func PositiveInconsistentPackageName() string {
    ruleID := "inconsistent_package_name"
    family := "style"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Directories that mix base Go package names after ignoring the _test suffix."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
